zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Maud Cromwell於1355年6月20日出生在英國林可爾史爾塔特沙拉爾時，她的父親Sir Ralph Cromwell KNIGHT, 1st Baron Of Cromwell17歲，母親Maud de Bernacke18歲。她於1374年與Sir William Fitz William在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾塔特沙拉爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1418年在她的家鄉享年63歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Maud Cromwell于1355年6月20日出生在英国林可爾史爾塔特沙拉爾时，她的父亲Sir Ralph Cromwell KNIGHT, 1st Baron Of Cromwell17岁，母亲Maud de Bernacke18岁。她于1374年与Sir William Fitz William在英国英格兰林可爾史爾塔特沙拉爾结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1418年在她的家乡享年63岁。

nameMeanings.name: Cromwell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from a place so named in Nottinghamshire, from Old English crumb ‘bent, crooked’ + well(a) ‘spring, stream’.

nameMeanings.name: Maud
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Medieval vernacular form of Matilda . This form was characteristically Low German (i.e. including medieval Dutch and Flemish). The wife of William the Conqueror , who bore this name, was the daughter of Baldwin , Count of Flanders. In Flemish and Dutch the letter -t- was generally lost when it occurred between vowels, giving forms such as Ma(h)auld. Maud or Matilda was also the name of the daughter ( 1102–67 ) of Henry I of England; she was married early in life to the Holy Roman Emperor Henry V , and later disputed the throne of England with her cousin Stephen . In 1128 she married Geoffrey , Count of Anjou. A medieval chronicler commented, ‘she was a good woman, but she had little bliss with him’. The name Maud became quite common in England in the 19th century, when its popularity was influenced in part by Tennyson's poem Maud, published in 1855 , but has not been much used since the early decades of the 20th century.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Maud Cromwell was born on 20 June 1355, in Tattershall, Lincolnshire, England, her father, Sir Ralph Cromwell KNIGHT, 1st Baron Of Cromwell, was 17 and her mother, Maud de Bernacke, was 18. She married Sir William Fitz William in 1374, in Tattershall, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. She died in 1418, in her hometown, at the age of 63.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Maud Cromwell est née le 20 juin 1355, à Tattershall, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Ralph Cromwell KNIGHT, 1st Baron Of Cromwell, avait 17 ans et sa mère, Maud de Bernacke, avait 18 ans. Elle a épousé Sir William Fitz William en 1374, à Tattershall, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée en 1418, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 63 ans.

de.Sprotborough, York, England: Sprotbrough and Cusworth, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Maud Cromwell am 20. Juni 1355 in Tattershall, Lincolnshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Ralph Cromwell KNIGHT, 1st Baron Of Cromwell 17 und ihre Mutter Maud de Bernacke 18. Sie hat 1374 in Tattershall, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom Sir William Fitz William geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb 1418 im Alter von 63 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Maud Cromwell è nata il il 20 giugno 1355 nel Tattershall, Lincolnshire, England, sua padre, Sir Ralph Cromwell KNIGHT, 1st Baron Of Cromwell, aveva 17 anni e sua madre, Maud de Bernacke, aveva 18 anni. Lei sposato Sir William Fitz William nel 1374, nel Tattershall, Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1418, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 63 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Maud Cromwellが1355年6月20日にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアタッテルシャルで生まれた時，父Sir Ralph Cromwell KNIGHT, 1st Baron Of Cromwellは17歳，母Maud de Bernackeは18歳であった。1374年にイギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアタッテルシャルでSir William Fitz Williamと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1418年に故郷で63歳で死去した。

ko.Sprotborough, York, England: 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 스프로트브루그h 앤드 커스워스
ko.lifeSummary: Lady Maud Cromwell(이)가 1355년 6월 20일 영국 링코실르 타터샤에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Ralph Cromwell KNIGHT, 1st Baron Of Cromwell(은)는 17세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Maud de Bernacke(은)는 18세였다. 그녀는 1374년 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 타터샤에서 Sir William Fitz William(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1418년 그녀의 고향에서 63세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Maud Cromwell nasceu em 20 de junho de 1355, em Tattershall, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Ralph Cromwell KNIGHT, 1st Baron Of Cromwell, tinha 17 anos e sua mãe, Maud de Bernacke, tinha 18 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir William Fitz William em 1374, em Tattershall, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas. ru.Sprotborough, York, England: спротброую анд кусворт, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Maud Cromwell родилась 20 июня 1355 г. в местности таттиршолл, линколншир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Ralph Cromwell KNIGHT, 1st Baron Of Cromwell было 17 лет, а матери, которую звали Maud de Bernacke, 18. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir William Fitz William в 1374 г. в местности таттиршолл, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла в 1418 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 63 лет.

Se casó con Sir William Fitz William en 1374, en Tattershall, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió en 1418, en su pueblo, a la edad de 63 años.
